recommendations.title: Mixed Nuts
recommendations.overview: The events of a crisis hotline business on one crazy night during the Christmas holidays.

recommendations.title: You've Got Mail
recommendations.overview: Book superstore magnate Joe Fox and independent book shop owner Kathleen Kelly fall in love in the anonymity of the Internet—both blissfully unaware that he's trying to put her out of business.

recommendations.title: Sleepless in Seattle
recommendations.overview: After the death of his mother, a young boy calls a radio station in an attempt to set his father up on a date. Across the country, an engaged woman becomes convinced that they belong together, despite their never having met. Will their paths collide

recommendations.title: Julie & Julia
recommendations.overview: Julia Child and Julie Powell – both of whom wrote memoirs – find their lives intertwined. Though separated by time and space, both women are at loose ends... until they discover that with the right combination of passion, fearlessness and butter, any

recommendations.title: Michael
recommendations.overview: Tabloid reporters are sent by their editor to investigate after the paper recieves a letter from a woman claiming an angel is living with her.

recommendations.title: Bewitched
recommendations.overview: Thinking he can overshadow an unknown actress in the part, an egocentric actor unknowingly gets a witch cast in an upcoming television remake of the classic show "Bewitched".

recommendations.title: Nightcrawler
recommendations.overview: When Lou Bloom, desperate for work, muscles into the world of L.A. crime journalism, he blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story. Aiding him in his effort is Nina, a TV-news veteran.

recommendations.title: UHF
recommendations.overview: The eccentric new manager of a UHF television channel tries to save the station from financial ruin with an odd array of programming.

recommendations.title: Dancer in the Dark

recommendations.title: God Bless America
recommendations.overview: Fed up with the cruelty and stupidity of American culture, an unlikely duo goes on a killing spree, killing reality TV stars, bigots and others they find repugnant.
